license_and_provenance.corpus_citation: K. K. Luke and May L. Y. Wong (2015), The Hong Kong Cantonese Corpus: Design and Uses

interpretation_warning: Lexical retrieval establishes candidate occurrence only. Rows are not gold syntactic analyses and cannot validate a parser construction.
